cards.entryTitle: Projects That Took Too Long to Get There
cards.title: La Sagrada Família
cards.creator: Antoni Gaudí and successors
cards.notice: A cathedral-scale project where design ambition, religious symbolism, lost plans, war, funding, tourism, and modern technology all shape a construction timeline across generations.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: We're All in This to Get There · Big ideas: Planning & Projects / Delay · Subjects: History / Design / Architecture / Urbanism

cards.entryTitle: Projects That Took Too Long to Get There
cards.title: Milan Cathedral
cards.creator: Multiple architects
cards.notice: A cathedral whose construction spanned centuries, turning delay into historical identity rather than simple failure.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: We're All in This to Get There · Big ideas: Planning & Projects / Delay · Subjects: History / Design / Architecture / Urbanism

cards.entryTitle: Projects That Took Too Long to Get There
cards.title: Ryugyong Hotel
cards.creator: Baikdoosan Architects & Engineers
cards.notice: A hotel that became a symbol of unfinished ambition: huge, visible, and iconic, but never functioning as the normal destination it was meant to become.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: We're All in This to Get There · Big ideas: Planning & Projects / Delay · Subjects: History / Design / Architecture / Urbanism

cards.entryTitle: Projects That Took Too Long to Get There
cards.title: Berlin Brandenburg Airport
cards.creator: gmp Architekten / airport planners
cards.notice: A modern airport delayed by fire safety, planning, management, regulatory, and technical failures, showing that advanced societies can still fail to coordinate complexity.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: We're All in This to Get There · Big ideas: Planning & Projects / Delay · Subjects: History / Design / Architecture / Urbanism

cards.entryTitle: Projects That Took Too Long to Get There
cards.title: Nusantara Capital City
cards.creator: Indonesian government / planners
cards.notice: A state-planned capital relocation project where political commitment, budget limits, land rights, and national priorities affect whether the city can arrive on schedule.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: We're All in This to Get There · Big ideas: Planning & Projects / Delay · Subjects: History / Design / Architecture / Urbanism

cards.entryTitle: Projects That Took Too Long to Get There
cards.title: Wonderland Amusement Park
cards.creator: Unfinished development
cards.notice: A never-opened theme park that turned into an abandoned landscape before being demolished, showing how imagined destinations can stall before they ever welcome visitors.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: We're All in This to Get There · Big ideas: Planning & Projects / Delay · Subjects: History / Design / Architecture / Urbanism

cards.entryTitle: Projects That Took Too Long to Get There
cards.title: Crazy Horse Memorial
cards.creator: Korczak Ziolkowski and successors
cards.notice: An ongoing monumental carving whose scale, family-led continuation, funding choices, and cultural controversy make completion itself part of the story.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: We're All in This to Get There · Big ideas: Planning & Projects / Delay · Subjects: History / Design / Architecture / Urbanism
